description: For those who love sport and style, this cap from nike makes for a perfect addition to your sporty wardrobe. Made of 100% cotton with eyelets for breathable comfort Curved visor to protect the eyes from sunlight Buckle strap at the back for a custom Fit Embroidered nike swoosh on side Cap care Hand wash in warm water Line dry Do not wring, bleach, tumble dry, iron or dry clean
